content_en:
— The Prophetic Medicine

The evil teachers In addition lured their students to vow to them, repent to them and swear by their names! This is taking such teachers as gods beside Allah. Allah said:

"It is not (possible) for any human being to whom Allah has given the Book and AJ-Hukm (the knowledge and understanding of the laws of religion) and Prophet hood to say to the people: "Be my worshippers rather than Allah's." On the contrary (he would say):

"Be you Rabbaniyyin (learned men of religion who practise what they know and In addition preach others), because you are teaching the

Book, and you are studying it. "Nor would he order you to take angels and Prophets for lords (gods) Would he order you to

disbelieve after you have submitted to Allah's

The prayer is the highest act of worship. Yet the teachers of false guidance, the so-called scholars and tyrants have divided the acts of prayer between themselves. For instance, the teachers of false guidance chose the highest act in the prayer, prostrating, for themselves. Some so-called scholars have In addition acquired bowing down for themselves. When they meet each other, some of them bow down before the others just

as one does while praying to Allah! As for the tyrants, they acquired standing up for themselves! Free and slave men stand up before the tyrants while the tyrants are sitting down.

The Messenger of Allah b has prohibited these three acts for other than Allah. Therefore, committing these prohibited acts is a clear violation of the Prophet's commands.

The Prophet b prohibited prostrating to other than Allah. He said:

"No one should prostrate to any other person."

He In addition criticized Mu'ath when he prostrated before him. Since prohibiting prostrating before the creation is clearly indicated in the Prophet's Sunnah, then those who allow such acts seek to dispute the rights of Allah and His Messenger b. Prostrating is one of the essential acts of worship. When the polytheist allows it to the creation, he will be allowing worshipping other than Allah. The Prophetb was once asked, "When one sees his brother, should he bow down for him?" He said, 'No.' He was asked, 'Should he hug and kiss him?" He said, 'No.' He was asked, 'Should he shake his hand?! He said, 'Yes.'

In addition, bowing down while greeting someone

—— The Prophetic Medicine

"And enter the gate in prostration." (or bowing with humility) (2:58)

Besides, prostrating and entering through the door is not possible at the same time [the prostration mentioned in the Verse is bowing down]!

The Prophet b In addition prohibited standing up for someone just as the non-Muslims used to do. He even disallowed this act during the prayer and commanded the Muslim to imitate the leader in the prayer, that if he sits down while praying due to an illness, they all sit behind him although they are healthy. Otherwise, they will be standing while the Imam is sitting down, although their standing is for Allah. How about if standing was for other than Allah?

The ignorant misguided people have associated others with Allah in the worship, thus prostrating before other than Allah and bowing down for other than Allah. They In addition stand up before the creation just as they do when they are praying. They In addition swear, vow, shave their heads, sacrifice, perform Tawaf (circumambulation of an object or person), love, fear, and

The Prophetic Medicine ———

obey other than Allah, just as they do for Allah and even more. They equate Allah, the Lord of the Worlds, Whom they worship, with the creation. These are the enemies of the Messages of the Messengers of Allah ste, who equate Allah with the creation. They are the ones who will say in the Fire, while arguing with the false deities they were worshipping.

"By Allah, we were truly, in a manifest error, When We hold you (false gods) as equals (in worship) with the Lord of the AI-'Alamin (mankind, jimm and all that exists); (26:97,98)

They are In addition the people, whom Allah described, when He said:

"And of mankind are some who take (for worship) others besides Allah as rivals (to Allah). They love them as they love Allah. But those who believe, Iove Allah more (then anything else)." (2:165)

All these are among the acts of Shirk (polytheism, associating others with Allah in worship) that Allah never forgives.

The Prophet's guidance on treating those touched by the evil eye

Imam Muslim [and Ahmad, Ibn Hibban, AI-

———— The Prophetic Medicine

Hakim and At-Tabarani] narrated that Ibn Ab'ass said, The Messenger of Allah b said:

"The evil eye is true, and (f there is anything that would precede Predestination, it would be the evil eye."

In addition, Muslim narrated that Anas "The Prophet b has allowed using Islamic prayer formulas *(Ruqyah, divine remedy) against fever, the evil eye and sores."

In addition, in the two sound books narrated that Abu Hurayrah said that the Messenger of Allah b said, "The evil eye is true." [Abu Dawood, Ibn Majah and Ahmad].

Abu Dawood reported that A'esha said:

"The person who touched others with the evil eye was commanded to perform ablution and the person whom he touched by the evil eye would wash with that water." [I\\-Bokhary, Muslim, An-Nasa'y, Ibn Majah, Abu Na‘im .

Further, A'esha narrated, as the Sahihain reported:

"The Prophet b commanded me, or commanded, that we should use Islamic prayer formulas from the evil eye.”

In addition, At-Termezey narrated that Asma’ Bint 198

Umaya said, "I said, O Messenger of Allah b The children of Ja'far are usually touched by the evil eye. Should I perform an Islamic prayer formula for them? He said:

"yes. If there is anything that precedes Predestination, it would be the evil eye.” [An-Nasa'y and Ahmad].

In addition, Imam Malik narrated that Amir bin Rabi'ah once saw Sahl bin Hunaif take a bath and said, "By Allah! I have never seen the skin of a virgin that is softer than what I have just seen." Sahl fell to the ground. The Prophet b then came to Amir while angry and said to him:

"Why would one of you kill his own brother? Why have you not said Tabrik [Karaka Allah, (may Allah bless it)]? Take a bath for it."

Amir then washed his face, hands, elbows, knees, feet and a part of his garment in a pot for what he had done and then poured the used water on Sahl. Soon after, Sahl started moving about with the people. [An-Nasa'y, Tbn Majah, Ahmad].

Malik In addition narrated: "The evil eye is true, so perform ablution for it."

Another Hadith narrated by Abdul Razzagq reads: 199

—— The Prophetic Medicine

"The evil eye is true. and if there is anything that precedes Predestination, it would be the evil eye. When one is touched by the evil eye, he should take a bath for it."

"The person who touched others with the evil eye should be commanded to submerge his hand in a pot of water and then wash his mouth, then spit the water back into the pot. He should then wash his face in the pot, then submerges his left hand it and pour some water on the right knee above the pot, and then submerges his right hand and pour water on his left knee. He should then wash his garment inside the pot and the water should not be spilled on the ground. Rather, it should be poured on top of the person whom he touched by the evil eye from behind all at once.”

There are two types of the evil eye, human and Jinn related. Umm Salamah said that the Prophet once saw a young gir, who had a certain expression on her face and said:

"Seek an Islamic prayer formula for her because she is touched by the evil eye." [AI-Bokhary, Muslim, AI- "Hakim, Abu Na'im. Al-Isma'ili and At-Tabarani]

Abu Sa'id In addition narrated that:

The Prophet b used to seek refuge from the jinn and the evil eye of mankind." [At-Termezey and AnNasa'y]

Some people who do not have sound comprehension or correct sight and hearing have rejected the fact that the evil eye causes harm, claiming that this is a superstitious, untrue belief. These people are indeed among the most ignorant people who have the least sound comprehension and the thickest minds. They are the farthest from acquiring knowledge of the soul and the heart and the effect of each on the natural world.

The best minds in every nation do not dispute the fact that the evil eye is true, although they differ on its causes and true effects. Some people say that when people who touch others by the evil eye feel evilness in their hearts, then their eyes transform the evil thoughts into harmful rays just like the type of snake that looks at its prey and causes it to perish.

Another group says that it is possible that invisible powers emit from the person who touches others with the evil eye and then enters the body of the person whom they touched and harms them.

However, other people say that Allah creates the harm on the pers: touched by the evil eye without any rays that emit from the eye of the person who touched

——— The Prophetic Medicine

him, Yet, this is the method of those who deny the existence of the various spiritual powers that exist in this world. Allah has created special powers in some of the creation that have profound effects on other creations. For instance, the soul has such a profound effect on the body that no one can deny. In addition, have you not noticed how the face of a shy person turns red if his sight falls on what is not suitable for him, and turns yellow when he looks at someone he fears? You can In addition witness the effect of the evil eye has on people and the weakness it causes in their bodies.

The evil eye is actually the effect exerted by the soul on the victim. Souls vary in their essence, powers, characteristics and qualities. Therefore, the soul of an envious person can harm a victim profoundly, and this is why Allah has commanded His Messenger to seek refuge with Him from the evil eye.

The harmful effect of an envious person on the envied person cannot be denied, except by those who are far away from reality. It is a fact that an evil envious soul touches the envied person in such an evil manner that it causes them harm. Similarly, the poisonous viper gets so enraged and evil when it meets the enemy that it has a special effect on the victim, sometimes leading to aborting the fetus or causing blindness. The Prophet gg described the short tailed viper and the striped viper as
content_id:
— Pengobatan Nabawi

Para guru yang sesat juga menggoda murid-murid mereka untuk bernazar kepada mereka, bertaubat kepada mereka, dan bersumpah dengan nama-nama mereka! Ini adalah menjadikan guru-guru tersebut sebagai tuhan-tuhan selain Allah. Allah berfirman:

"Tidak wajar bagi seseorang yang Allah berikan kepadanya Al-Kitab dan Al-Hukm (pengetahuan dan pemahaman tentang hukum-hukum agama) dan kenabian, lalu dia berkata kepada manusia: 'Jadilah kalian penyembahku selain Allah.' Sebaliknya (dia akan berkata):

"Jadilah kalian orang-orang Rabbani (ulama yang mengamalkan ilmu mereka dan juga mengajarkannya kepada orang lain), karena kalian mengajarkan Al-Kitab dan kalian mempelajarinya." Dan tidak (wajar pula) dia menyuruh kalian menjadikan malaikat dan para nabi sebagai tuhan-tuhan. Apakah (patut) dia menyuruh kalian

kafir setelah kalian berserah diri kepada Allah?

Salah adalah bentuk ibadah yang paling tinggi. Namun para guru kesesatan, para ulama palsu, dan para penguasa lalim telah membagi-bagi amalan salah di antara mereka sendiri. Misalnya, para guru kesesatan memilih amalan tertinggi dalam salah, yaitu sujud, untuk diri mereka sendiri. Sebagian ulama palsu juga mengambil ruku' untuk diri mereka sendiri. Ketika mereka saling bertemu, sebagian dari mereka membungkuk di hadapan yang lain persis

seperti yang dilakukan seseorang ketika salah kepada Allah! Adapun para penguasa lalim, mereka mengambil berdiri untuk diri mereka sendiri! Orang-orang merdeka dan budak berdiri di hadapan para penguasa lalim sementara mereka duduk.

Rasulullah ﷺ telah melarang ketiga perbuatan ini untuk selain Allah. Oleh karena itu, melakukan perbuatan-perbuatan terlarang ini adalah pelanggaran yang jelas terhadap perintah Nabi.

Nabi ﷺ melarang sujud kepada selain Allah. Beliau bersabda:

"Tidak boleh seseorang bersujud kepada orang lain."

Beliau juga menegur Mu'adz ketika dia bersujud di hadapan beliau. Karena larangan bersujud kepada makhluk telah jelas ditunjukkan dalam Sunnah Nabi, maka mereka yang membolehkan perbuatan tersebut berusaha memperebutkan hak-hak Allah dan Rasul-Nya ﷺ. Sujud adalah salah satu amalan ibadah yang paling pokok. Ketika orang musyrik membolehkannya kepada makhluk, maka dia telah membolehkan beribadah kepada selain Allah. Nabi ﷺ pernah ditanya, "Ketika seseorang bertemu saudaranya, haruskah dia membungkuk kepadanya?" Beliau menjawab, "Tidak." Ditanya lagi, "Haruskah dia memeluk dan menciumnya?" Beliau menjawab, "Tidak." Ditanya lagi, "Haruskah dia berjabat tangan dengannya?" Beliau menjawab, "Ya."

Selain itu, membungkuk ketika menyapa seseorang

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

"Dan masuklah melalui pintu itu dengan bersujud (atau membungkuk dengan penuh kerendahan hati)." (QS. Al-Baqarah: 58)

Lagipula, bersujud dan masuk melalui pintu tidak mungkin dilakukan pada saat yang bersamaan [sujud yang disebutkan dalam ayat ini adalah membungkuk]!

Nabi ﷺ juga melarang berdiri untuk seseorang sebagaimana yang biasa dilakukan orang-orang non-Muslim. Bahkan beliau melarang perbuatan ini dalam salah dan memerintahkan kaum Muslim untuk mengikuti imam dalam salah, yaitu jika imam duduk saat salah karena sakit, mereka semua duduk di belakangnya meskipun mereka sehat. Jika tidak, mereka akan berdiri sementara imam duduk, padahal berdiri mereka itu untuk Allah. Lalu bagaimana jika berdiri itu untuk selain Allah?

Orang-orang jahil yang tersesat telah mempersekutukan Allah dalam ibadah, sehingga mereka bersujud kepada selain Allah dan membungkuk untuk selain Allah. Mereka juga berdiri di hadapan makhluk persis seperti yang mereka lakukan ketika salah. Mereka juga bersumpah, bernazar, mencukur kepala, berkurban, bertawaf (mengelilingi suatu benda atau seseorang), mencintai, takut, dan

Pengobatan Nabawi ———

taat kepada selain Allah, sebagaimana yang mereka lakukan untuk Allah bahkan lebih. Mereka menyamakan Allah, Rabb semesta alam, yang mereka sembah, dengan makhluk. Mereka adalah musuh-musuh risalah para Rasul Allah, yang menyamakan Allah dengan makhluk. Mereka adalah orang-orang yang akan berkata di dalam Neraka, sambil berdebat dengan sesembahan palsu yang mereka ibadahi.

"Demi Allah, sungguh kami dahulu dalam kesesatan yang nyata, ketika kami menyamakan kalian (sesembahan palsu) dengan Rabb seluruh alam." (QS. Asy-Syu'ara: 97-98)

Mereka juga adalah orang-orang yang Allah sebutkan sifatnya ketika berfirman:

"Dan di antara manusia ada orang-orang yang menjadikan (menyembah) tandingan-tandingan selain Allah. Mereka mencintainya sebagaimana mereka mencintai Allah. Adapun orang-orang yang beriman sangat besar cintanya kepada Allah." (QS. Al-Baqarah: 165)

Semua ini termasuk perbuatan shirk (mempersekutukan Allah dalam ibadah) yang tidak pernah Allah ampuni.

Petunjuk Nabi dalam mengobati orang yang terkena 'ain (mata jahat)

Imam Muslim [dan Ahmad, Ibnu Hibban, Al-

———— Pengobatan Nabawi

Hakim dan Ath-Thabarani] meriwayatkan bahwa Ibnu Abbas berkata, Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda:

"'Ain (mata jahat) itu benar adanya, dan seandainya ada sesuatu yang mendahului takdir, maka itu adalah 'ain."

Selain itu, Muslim meriwayatkan bahwa Anas berkata: "Nabi ﷺ membolehkan penggunaan ruqyah syar'iyyah untuk demam, 'ain, dan luka."

Juga, dalam dua kitab shahih diriwayatkan bahwa Abu Hurayrah berkata bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda, "'Ain itu benar adanya." [Abu Dawud, Ibnu Majah dan Ahmad].

Abu Dawud meriwayatkan bahwa Aisyah berkata:

"Orang yang mengenai orang lain dengan 'ain diperintahkan untuk berwudhu dan orang yang terkena 'ain itu mencuci diri dengan air wudhu tersebut." [Al-Bukhari, Muslim, An-Nasa'i, Ibnu Majah, Abu Na'im].

Lebih lanjut, Aisyah meriwayatkan, sebagaimana diriwayatkan dalam dua kitab shahih:

"Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan aku, atau memerintahkan, agar kami menggunakan ruqyah syar'iyyah dari 'ain."

Selain itu, At-Tirmidzi meriwayatkan bahwa Asma' binti 198

Umays berkata, "Aku berkata, 'Wahai Rasulullah ﷺ, anak-anak Ja'far biasanya terkena 'ain. Haruskah aku meruqyah mereka?' Beliau menjawab:

"Ya. Seandainya ada sesuatu yang mendahului takdir, maka itu adalah 'ain." [An-Nasa'i dan Ahmad].

Selain itu, Imam Malik meriwayatkan bahwa Amir bin Rabi'ah pernah melihat Sahl bin Hunaif mandi lalu berkata, "Demi Allah! Aku belum pernah melihat kulit seorang gadis perawan yang lebih halus dari yang baru saja aku lihat." Sahl pun jatuh ke tanah. Nabi ﷺ kemudian mendatangi Amir dengan marah dan berkata kepadanya:

"Mengapa salah seorang dari kalian membunuh saudaranya sendiri? Mengapa kamu tidak mengucapkan tabrik [Barakallah (semoga Allah memberkatinya)]? Mandilah untuk itu."

Amir kemudian membasuh wajahnya, kedua tangannya, kedua sikunya, kedua lututnya, kedua kakinya, dan bagian pakaiannya dalam sebuah bejana atas apa yang telah dia lakukan, lalu menuangkan air bekas itu ke atas Sahl. Tak lama kemudian, Sahl mulai berjalan-jalan bersama orang-orang. [An-Nasa'i, Ibnu Majah, Ahmad].

Malik juga meriwayatkan: "'Ain itu benar adanya, maka berwudhulah untuknya."

Hadith lain yang diriwayatkan oleh Abdurrazzaq berbunyi: 199

—— Pengobatan Nabawi

"'Ain itu benar adanya, dan seandainya ada sesuatu yang mendahului takdir, maka itu adalah 'ain. Jika seseorang terkena 'ain, hendaklah dia mandi untuknya."

"Orang yang mengenai orang lain dengan 'ain hendaknya diperintahkan untuk memasukkan tangannya ke dalam bejana berisi air lalu membasuh mulutnya, kemudian meludahkan air itu kembali ke dalam bejana. Kemudian dia membasuh wajahnya di dalam bejana, lalu memasukkan tangan kirinya dan menuangkan air ke atas lutut kanannya di atas bejana, kemudian memasukkan tangan kanannya dan menuangkan air ke atas lutut kirinya. Kemudian dia membasuh pakaiannya di dalam bejana dan air itu tidak boleh ditumpahkan ke tanah. Sebaliknya, air itu harus dituangkan ke atas kepala orang yang terkena 'ain dari belakang sekaligus."

Ada dua jenis 'ain, yaitu dari manusia dan dari jin. Ummu Salamah berkata bahwa Nabi ﷺ pernah melihat seorang gadis kecil yang memiliki ekspresi tertentu di wajahnya dan bersabda:

"Carikan ruqyah syar'iyyah untuknya karena dia terkena 'ain." [Al-Bukhari, Muslim, Al-Hakim, Abu Na'im, Al-Isma'ili dan Ath-Thabarani]

Abu Sa'id juga meriwayatkan bahwa:

"Nabi ﷺ biasa berlindung dari jin dan 'ain manusia." [At-Tirmidzi dan An-Nasa'i]

Sebagian orang yang tidak memiliki pemahaman yang benar atau penglihatan dan pendengaran yang tepat telah menolak kenyataan bahwa 'ain menyebabkan bahaya, dengan mengklaim bahwa ini adalah keyakinan takhayul yang tidak benar. Orang-orang ini sesungguhnya termasuk manusia yang paling jahil, yang paling sedikit pemahamannya, dan yang paling tebal akalnya. Mereka adalah yang paling jauh dari memperoleh pengetahuan tentang jiwa dan hati serta pengaruh keduanya terhadap alam semesta.

Para pemikir terbaik di setiap bangsa tidak membantah kenyataan bahwa 'ain itu benar adanya, meskipun mereka berbeda pendapat tentang sebab-sebab dan pengaruhnya yang sebenarnya. Sebagian orang berkata bahwa ketika orang yang mengenai orang lain dengan 'ain merasakan kejahatan di dalam hati mereka, maka mata mereka mengubah pikiran jahat itu menjadi sinar-sinar berbahaya, sama seperti jenis ular yang menatap mangsanya dan menyebabkannya binasa.

Kelompok lain mengatakan bahwa mungkin saja kekuatan tak kasat mata terpancar dari orang yang menyentuh orang lain dengan mata jahat (al-'ain), kemudian masuk ke dalam tubuh orang yang terkena dan menyebabkan bahaya pada mereka.

Namun, orang lain mengatakan bahwa Allah menciptakan bahaya pada orang yang terkena mata jahat tanpa adanya pancaran sinar apa pun dari mata orang yang mengenainya.

——— Pengobatan Nabawi

Akan tetapi, ini adalah metode mereka yang mengingkari keberadaan berbagai kekuatan spiritual yang ada di dunia ini. Allah telah menciptakan kekuatan khusus pada sebagian makhluk-Nya yang memiliki pengaruh mendalam terhadap makhluk lainnya. Misalnya, jiwa memiliki pengaruh yang begitu mendalam terhadap tubuh sehingga tidak ada seorang pun yang dapat mengingkarinya. Selain itu, tidakkah engkau memperhatikan bagaimana wajah orang yang malu menjadi merah jika pandangannya tertuju pada sesuatu yang tidak pantas baginya, dan menjadi pucat kekuningan ketika ia memandang seseorang yang ditakutinya? Engkau juga dapat menyaksikan pengaruh mata jahat terhadap manusia dan kelemahan yang ditimbulkannya pada tubuh mereka.

Mata jahat sesungguhnya adalah pengaruh yang diberikan oleh jiwa terhadap korbannya. Jiwa-jiwa berbeda dalam hakikat, kekuatan, sifat, dan kualitasnya. Oleh karena itu, jiwa orang yang hasad dapat membahayakan korbannya secara mendalam, dan inilah sebabnya Allah memerintahkan Rasul-Nya untuk berlindung kepada-Nya dari mata jahat.

Pengaruh berbahaya dari orang yang hasad terhadap orang yang dihasadi tidak dapat diingkari, kecuali oleh mereka yang jauh dari kenyataan. Adalah fakta bahwa jiwa yang jahat dan penuh hasad menyentuh orang yang dihasadi dengan cara yang begitu buruk sehingga menyebabkan bahaya pada mereka. Demikian pula, ular berbisa menjadi begitu marah dan ganas ketika bertemu musuhnya sehingga memiliki pengaruh khusus terhadap korbannya, yang terkadang menyebabkan keguguran janin atau kebutaan. Nabi ﷺ menyifati ular berekor pendek dan ular bergaris sebagai
content_ar:
— The Prophetic Medicine

The evil teachers In addition lured their students to vow to them, repent to them and swear by their names! This is taking such teachers as gods beside الله. الله said:

"It is not (possible) for any human being to whom الله has given the Book and AJ-Hukm (the knowledge and understanding of the laws of religion) and Prophet hood to say to the people: "Be my worshippers rather than الله's." On the contrary (he would say):

"Be you Rabbaniyyin (learned men of religion who practise what they know and In addition preach others), because you are teaching the

Book, and you are studying it. "Nor would he order you to take angels and Prophets for lords (gods) Would he order you to

disbelieve after you have submitted to الله's

The prayer is the highest act of worship. Yet the teachers of false guidance, the so-called scholars and tyrants have divided the acts of prayer between themselves. For instance, the teachers of false guidance chose the highest act in the prayer, prostrating, for themselves. Some so-called scholars have In addition acquired bowing down for themselves. When they meet each other, some of them bow down before the others just

as one does while praying to الله! As for the tyrants, they acquired standing up for themselves! Free and slave men stand up before the tyrants while the tyrants are sitting down.

رسول الله ﷺ b has prohibited these three acts for other than الله. Therefore, committing these prohibited acts is a clear violation of النبي ﷺ's commands.

النبي ﷺ b prohibited prostrating to other than الله. He said:

"No one should prostrate to any other person."

He In addition criticized Mu'ath when he prostrated before him. Since prohibiting prostrating before the creation is clearly indicated in النبي ﷺ's السنة النبوية, then those who allow such acts seek to dispute the rights of الله and His Messenger b. Prostrating is one of the essential acts of worship. When the polytheist allows it to the creation, he will be allowing worshipping other than الله. The Prophetb was once asked, "When one sees his brother, should he bow down for him?" He said, 'No.' He was asked, 'Should he hug and kiss him?" He said, 'No.' He was asked, 'Should he shake his hand?! He said, 'Yes.'

In addition, bowing down while greeting someone

—— The Prophetic Medicine

"And enter the gate in prostration." (or bowing with humility) (2:58)

Besides, prostrating and entering through the door is not possible at the same time [the prostration mentioned in the Verse is bowing down]!

النبي ﷺ b In addition prohibited standing up for someone just as the non-Muslims used to do. He even disallowed this act during the prayer and commanded the Muslim to imitate the leader in the prayer, that if he sits down while praying due to an illness, they all sit behind him although they are healthy. Otherwise, they will be standing while the Imam is sitting down, although their standing is for الله. How about if standing was for other than الله?

The ignorant misguided people have associated others with الله in the worship, thus prostrating before other than الله and bowing down for other than الله. They In addition stand up before the creation just as they do when they are praying. They In addition swear, vow, shave their heads, sacrifice, perform Tawaf (circumambulation of an object or person), love, fear, and

The Prophetic Medicine ———

obey other than الله, just as they do for الله and even more. They equate الله, the Lord of the Worlds, Whom they worship, with the creation. These are the enemies of the Messages of the Messengers of الله ste, who equate الله with the creation. They are the ones who will say in the Fire, while arguing with the false deities they were worshipping.

"By الله, we were truly, in a manifest error, When We hold you (false gods) as equals (in worship) with the Lord of the AI-'Alamin (mankind, jimm and all that exists); (26:97,98)

They are In addition the people, whom الله described, when He said:

"And of mankind are some who take (for worship) others besides الله as rivals (to الله). They love them as they love الله. But those who believe, Iove الله more (then anything else)." (2:165)

All these are among the acts of Shirk (polytheism, associating others with الله in worship) that الله never forgives.

النبي ﷺ's guidance on treating those touched by the evil eye

Imam Muslim [and Ahmad, Ibn Hibban, AI-

———— The Prophetic Medicine

Hakim and At-Tabarani] narrated that Ibn Ab'ass said, رسول الله ﷺ b said:

"The evil eye is true, and (f there is anything that would precede Predestination, it would be the evil eye."

In addition, Muslim narrated that Anas "النبي ﷺ b has allowed using Islamic prayer formulas *(Ruqyah, divine remedy) against fever, the evil eye and sores."

In addition, in the two sound books narrated that Abu Hurayrah said that رسول الله ﷺ b said, "The evil eye is true." [Abu Dawood, Ibn Majah and Ahmad].

Abu Dawood reported that A'esha said:

"The person who touched others with the evil eye was commanded to perform ablution and the person whom he touched by the evil eye would wash with that water." [I\\-Bokhary, Muslim, An-Nasa'y, Ibn Majah, Abu Na‘im .

Further, A'esha narrated, as the Sahihain reported:

"النبي ﷺ b commanded me, or commanded, that we should use Islamic prayer formulas from the evil eye.”

In addition, At-Termezey narrated that Asma’ Bint 198

Umaya said, "I said, O رسول الله ﷺ b The children of Ja'far are usually touched by the evil eye. Should I perform an Islamic prayer formula for them? He said:

"yes. If there is anything that precedes Predestination, it would be the evil eye.” [An-Nasa'y and Ahmad].

In addition, Imam Malik narrated that Amir bin Rabi'ah once saw Sahl bin Hunaif take a bath and said, "By الله! I have never seen the skin of a virgin that is softer than what I have just seen." Sahl fell to the ground. النبي ﷺ b then came to Amir while angry and said to him:

"Why would one of you kill his own brother? Why have you not said Tabrik [Karaka الله, (may الله bless it)]? Take a bath for it."

Amir then washed his face, hands, elbows, knees, feet and a part of his garment in a pot for what he had done and then poured the used water on Sahl. Soon after, Sahl started moving about with the people. [An-Nasa'y, Tbn Majah, Ahmad].

Malik In addition narrated: "The evil eye is true, so perform ablution for it."

Another الحديث narrated by Abdul Razzagq reads: 199

—— The Prophetic Medicine

"The evil eye is true. and if there is anything that precedes Predestination, it would be the evil eye. When one is touched by the evil eye, he should take a bath for it."

"The person who touched others with the evil eye should be commanded to submerge his hand in a pot of water and then wash his mouth, then spit the water back into the pot. He should then wash his face in the pot, then submerges his left hand it and pour some water on the right knee above the pot, and then submerges his right hand and pour water on his left knee. He should then wash his garment inside the pot and the water should not be spilled on the ground. Rather, it should be poured on top of the person whom he touched by the evil eye from behind all at once.”

There are two types of the evil eye, human and Jinn related. Umm Salamah said that النبي ﷺ once saw a young gir, who had a certain expression on her face and said:

"Seek an Islamic prayer formula for her because she is touched by the evil eye." [AI-Bokhary, Muslim, AI- "Hakim, Abu Na'im. Al-Isma'ili and At-Tabarani]

Abu Sa'id In addition narrated that:

النبي ﷺ b used to seek refuge from the jinn and the evil eye of mankind." [At-Termezey and AnNasa'y]

Some people who do not have sound comprehension or correct sight and hearing have rejected the fact that the evil eye causes harm, claiming that this is a superstitious, untrue belief. These people are indeed among the most ignorant people who have the least sound comprehension and the thickest minds. They are the farthest from acquiring knowledge of the soul and the heart and the effect of each on the natural world.

The best minds in every nation do not dispute the fact that the evil eye is true, although they differ on its causes and true effects. Some people say that when people who touch others by the evil eye feel evilness in their hearts, then their eyes transform the evil thoughts into harmful rays just like the type of snake that looks at its prey and causes it to perish.

Another group says that it is possible that invisible powers emit from the person who touches others with the evil eye and then enters the body of the person whom they touched and harms them.

However, other people say that الله creates the harm on the pers: touched by the evil eye without any rays that emit from the eye of the person who touched

——— The Prophetic Medicine

him, Yet, this is the method of those who deny the existence of the various spiritual powers that exist in this world. الله has created special powers in some of the creation that have profound effects on other creations. For instance, the soul has such a profound effect on the body that no one can deny. In addition, have you not noticed how the face of a shy person turns red if his sight falls on what is not suitable for him, and turns yellow when he looks at someone he fears? You can In addition witness the effect of the evil eye has on people and the weakness it causes in their bodies.

The evil eye is actually the effect exerted by the soul on the victim. Souls vary in their essence, powers, characteristics and qualities. Therefore, the soul of an envious person can harm a victim profoundly, and this is why الله has commanded His Messenger to seek refuge with Him from the evil eye.

The harmful effect of an envious person on the envied person cannot be denied, except by those who are far away from reality. It is a fact that an evil envious soul touches the envied person in such an evil manner that it causes them harm. Similarly, the poisonous viper gets so enraged and evil when it meets the enemy that it has a special effect on the victim, sometimes leading to aborting the fetus or causing blindness. النبي ﷺ gg described the short tailed viper and the striped viper as
